playbook.intent: Monthly invoice run. Done = invoices out by 1st, payment received by 15th, late ones escalated by 30th without burning the relationship.
playbook.scope: Monthly invoice run. Done = invoices out by 1st, payment received by 15th, late ones escalated by 30th without burning the relationship.

success-criteria.criterion: Send stage complete: Invoices sent log
Track + nudge stage complete: Chase-up log
Escalate stage complete: Late fee invoice

stage.name: Send
stage.intent: Invoices out by the 1st of the month.

tasks.task: Generate invoices from time tracker / milestones

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all active clients invoiced by EOD on the 1st.

stage.name: Track + nudge
stage.intent: Friendly day-7 nudge; firm day-15 reminder.

tasks.task: Set day-7 + day-15 reminders per invoice

stage.decision-gate: Advance once payment received OR escalation triggered.

stage.name: Escalate
stage.intent: Day-30 escalation without burning the relationship.

tasks.task: Pause new work until paid (per clause)

stage.decision-gate: Escalation closes only when paid OR engagement formally suspended.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content invoice-send-chase-up --format md, agent: faion get-content invoice-send-chase-up --format context, json: faion get-content invoice-send-chase-up --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
